untranslatable_reason: Continuation Gap pattern requires precise measurement of trend low reference point (Point A) and geometric gap midpoint calculation to project target price. These require multi-bar lookback pattern matching and distance calculations not supported by standard indicator conditions. The pattern relies on: (1) identifying exact trend low pivot, (2) calculating distance from that pivot to gap center, (3) adding that distance to gap midpoint for target—all of which require custom bar-by-bar analysis beyond indicator-based conditions. Gap direction (up/down) and volume spike can be approximated via indicators, but the core targeting mechanism is untranslatable.
